description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the python:3 Docker image with a before_script that runs pip install --editable . Define two stages: deploy and pages. Add a deploy_to_pypi job in the deploy stage that runs only on tags and executes pip install -U twine setuptools wheel, python setup.py bdist_wheel, and twine upload -u $PYPI_USER -p $PYPI_PASS dist/* to publish a wheel to PyPI. Add a release_to_tag job also in the deploy stage that runs only on tags and executes pip3 install -U setuptools wheel, python3 setup.py sdist bdist_wheel, pip3 install gitlab_release, and python3 -m gitlab_release $PRIVATE_TOKEN dist/* to create a GitLab release. Add a pages job in the pages stage that runs only on tags, runs pip3 install -e ./ and python3 -m gitlab_tags_to_pip_index ./public, and defines an artifact with the public directory. Ensure the pages job publishes the public/ folder as the GitLab Pages artifact.
